text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: matthew

Log:
  Drop the MCRYPT option.  MCRYPT has been deprecated by upstream PHP
  and the mcrypt project itself is abandonware.

  PR:		222290
  Reported by:	olivierw1+bugzilla-freebsd@hotmail.com
